title: iputils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[20210202-15.0.1]
- Upstream backport 'ping: Add SA_RESTART to sa_flags' [Orabug: 34573399]

[20210202-15]
- Fix CVE-2025-48964 iputils: iputils integer overflow (RHEL-112000)

[20210202-14]
- arping: Fix exit code if receive more replies than sent (RHEL-98281)

[20210202-13]
- Fix ping hangs under ASan on aarch64 (RHEL-96871)

[20210202-12]
- Fix CVE-2025-47268 iputils: Signed Integer Overflow in Timestamp Multiplication in iputils ping (RHEL-94334)
full_text:
[20210202-15.0.1]
- Upstream backport 'ping: Add SA_RESTART to sa_flags' [Orabug: 34573399]

[20210202-15]
- Fix CVE-2025-48964 iputils: iputils integer overflow (RHEL-112000)

[20210202-14]
- arping: Fix exit code if receive more replies than sent (RHEL-98281)

[20210202-13]
- Fix ping hangs under ASan on aarch64 (RHEL-96871)

[20210202-12]
- Fix CVE-2025-47268 iputils: Signed Integer Overflow in Timestamp Multiplication in iputils ping (RHEL-94334)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20573-0.html
